customDances.description: Coordinates a multi-role investment analysis act from intake to report handoff.
customDances.content: Summarize the request, delegate to the most relevant specialists first, keep assumptions explicit, and converge toward one clear final recommendation with open risks.

customDances.description: Stress-tests an investment thesis for downside, uncertainty, and hidden assumptions.
customDances.content: Focus on downside cases, fragile assumptions, missing data, regime sensitivity, and reasons the thesis could be wrong. Prefer explicit uncertainty over false precision.

performers.description: Lead coordinator for the investment analysis team.
Collects and validates data for the rest of the team.
Performs bottom-up company and valuation analysis.
Handles signal, factor, and technical analysis.
Adds market regime and macro context.
Challenges the thesis and highlights downside risks.
Synthesizes the final report and artifact package.

act.description: Task-centric investment analysis team for Discord-driven runtime sessions.
actRules: Start with the participant most aligned to the user's requested focus.
Escalate missing data and weak assumptions explicitly.
Route final synthesis through the report editor before completion.

relations.name: intake-and-routing
relations.description: Coordinator and Data align on scope, symbols, and missing inputs before specialist work begins.

relations.name: data-support
relations.description: Data supports the Fundamental analyst with validated company and valuation inputs.

relations.name: signal-support
relations.description: Data supports the Quant analyst with market, factor, and price series inputs.

relations.name: regime-context
relations.description: Macro provides regime context that can strengthen or weaken the base fundamental thesis.

relations.name: challenge-review
relations.description: Risk challenges the active thesis and feeds unresolved concerns back to the Coordinator.

relations.name: final-synthesis
relations.description: Coordinator hands consolidated findings to Report for final summary and artifact packaging.
